case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. THE NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO MTN BY BAIL AGENT TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE THE BOND FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, BAIL AGENT BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FOREFEITURE AND EXONERATE THE BOND. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT ORDERED SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST BAD BOYS VACATED AND THE JUDGMENT IS AMENDED BY ENTERING SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST THE SURETY, THE NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY. BAD BOYS MOTION IS RENDERED MOOT, AND TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Entered On A Bail Bond
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANT THE NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON A BAIL BOND is off calendar. Motion withdrawn on February 28, 2011. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216

(Amended) Notice Of Motion By Bail Agent To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Vacate Forefeiture And Exonerate The Bond
Off Calendar Jan-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
BAIL AGENT BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FOREFEITURE AND EXONERATE THE BOND.

APPEARANCES: Leonor Noguez, Deputy City Atty 554-3854 for pltf & opposing party People of the State of California; Jeff Stamp, Esq. 408/607-7263 for bail agent & moving party Bad Boys Bail Bonds.

RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: The Court ordered summary judgment against Bad Boys vacated and the judgment is amended by entering summary judgment against the surety, The North River Insurance Company. Bad Boys motion is rendered moot, and taken off calendar. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

(Amended) Notice Of Motion By Bail Agent To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Vacate Forefeiture And Exonerate The Bond
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Continued To Jan-03-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
